nasb.text: Now the king of Aram had commanded the captains of his chariots, saying, “Do not fight with small or great, but with the king of Israel alone.”

esv.text: Now the king of Syria had commanded the captains of his chariots, “Fight with neither small nor great, but only with the king of Israel.”

cnv.text: 原來亞蘭王曾經吩咐他的戰車隊長說：“無論是大小的將兵，你們都不要和他們交戰，只管攻擊以色列王。”

ccb.text: 亚兰王已经吩咐战车长不要与对方的大小军兵交锋，只攻击以色列王。
